overall.description: A smooth drone camera flythrough in a video game showcasing the Montreal Olympic Stadium, circling counter-clockwise around the iconic concrete structure with its distinctive leaning tower. The clip begins at a colorful Olympic installation wall, approaches the main stadium entrance, passes the glass dome structure, and ends with views of surrounding residential apartment buildings under a bright blue sky with scattered clouds.

events.description: olympic stadium structure first comes into view on the right horizon

agents.ego_description: drone camera flying low along a curved concrete path approaching the stadium complex

large concrete stadium with curved roof sections and ribbed facade

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide concrete plaza featuring a colorful Olympic installation wall with red, blue, yellow, and green panels. The drone camera moves smoothly along a curved path, and the massive concrete Olympic stadium structure first appears on the right horizon against a bright blue sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: main stadium entrance plaza with tower

events.description: camera slows slightly while approaching the main stadium entrance facade

agents.ego_description: approaching the front of the Olympic stadium, moving toward the main entrance with the tower rising overhead

entered.detail: tall leaning concrete tower with observation deck windows rising above the stadium
circular glass and metal dome structure in front of the stadium entrance

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches the main stadium entrance, revealing the iconic leaning Olympic tower rising above the curved concrete roof. The colorful wall falls behind as the glass dome entrance comes into view on the right, and the stadium facade fills the center of the frame with its massive scale.

scene_state.functional_zone: stadium side plaza with glass dome entrance

events.description: camera passes the glass dome entrance and begins circling the side of the stadium
residential apartment buildings first appear in the distance on the right

agents.ego_description: circling counter-clockwise around the side of the stadium, passing the glass dome structure

entered.detail: multi-story beige apartment complexes visible beyond the stadium perimeter

segments.scene_description: The camera circles around the side of the stadium, passing closely by the glass dome entrance structure. The stadium facade moves to the left side of the frame while residential apartment buildings come into view on the right horizon, indicating the transition from the sports complex to the surrounding neighborhood.

events.description: stadium structure exits frame left as camera focuses on residential buildings

agents.ego_description: moving past the stadium toward the residential area, panning right to show apartment buildings

entered.detail: concrete wall running along the right side of the plaza separating from lower area

segments.scene_description: The stadium and tower exit the frame to the left as the camera turns toward the residential district. The view opens to show beige apartment buildings and a concrete perimeter wall on the right, marking the transition from the Olympic complex to the surrounding urban residential area under the bright midday sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drone movement that transitions from a vibrant Olympic plaza to the surrounding urban residential district. It begins by gliding along a wide concrete plaza past a colorful installation wall of red, blue, yellow, and green panels, as the massive concrete stadium first emerges on the right horizon. As the camera approaches the main entrance, the colorful wall recedes and the iconic leaning tower rises above the curved roof, with the glass dome entrance coming into view. The scene then shifts as the camera circles the stadium, moving the facade to the left while beige apartment buildings begin to appear on the right horizon. Finally, the stadium and tower exit the frame entirely as the camera turns toward the residential district, opening onto a view of apartment blocks and a concrete perimeter wall under a bright midday sky.
